stemHtml: An aircraft takes-off from airport A (N33°56’, W118°24’) (UTC -7 hours) at 21:15 Standard Time on 17<sup>th</sup> of February and after a total flight of 15 hours and 25 minutes arrives at airport B (N22°18’, E113°55’) (UTC + 8 hours). What is the Standard Time (ST) and local date when arriving at aerodrome B?
